summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/10/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.27% today, the main contract closed 662.5. The traders' willingness to ship is general . The steel mills are purchase on demand.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.
